strategy_intent: Structural reframe dekar self-blame reduce karna.
text: Izzat pressure + debt overlap mein overload structural hota hai, personal defect nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab utna heavy feel nahi ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progress reinforce karna.
text: Pressure ke beech structure banana tumhari practical strength hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Task list dekhte trigger aata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Trigger ke liye 3 concise resets dena.
text: 3 deep exhales, 10-min chunk, pehla easy chunk complete.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, chunking karunga. Main theek hona chahta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second structural reframe dena.
text: Duty-heavy phase mein micro-steps sustainable hote hain kyunki next action clear hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab stable lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stability acknowledge karna.
text: Strong shift hai, tumne load ke beech direction hold rakhi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal wave aaye toh us moment koi raasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: In-the-moment 3 quick options dena.
text: 30-sec pause, next 10-min task pick, completion pe tick mark. Bas.

speaker: Seeker
text: 10-min reset useful hai, follow karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen approach reinforce karna.
text: Practical choice hai, tum pressure ko manageable bana rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks, ab lag raha kal nikal jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night close ke tiny anchors dena.
text: Aaj raat paani, 5-min breathing, aur kal ka first-task note visible. Bas itna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, ab settled feel ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final close mein progress reinforce karna.
text: Aaj tum duty exhaustion loop se structured flow tak aaye ho, yeh strong shift hai. Ek phase tumhari value define nahi karta, kal ke anchors ready hain.
